landing_tagline: Rise through the ranks. Rule the city.
landing_description: Commit crimes, earn cash and build your criminal empire. Do you have what it takes to become the most feared boss in town?
side_footer_left: A Hustler's Way • The Family Table
common_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
username_desc: This is the name other players will see. Choose wisely — it cannot be changed (yet).
error_username_invalid: Invalid name. Use 3–16 letters, numbers or _.
register_check_email: Almost there! Check your email inbox to confirm your account.
error_user_exists: An account with this email already exists.
error_password_short: Password must be at least 6 characters.
error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
error_load_player: Could not load your player profile. Try refreshing the page.
crime_result_success: Success! You got away with {cash} (+{xp} XP)
crime_result_fail: Busted! The cops threw you in jail. No XP gained on failure.
crime_level_up: LEVEL UP! You are now level {level}!
error_on_cooldown: Too hot right now — this crime is still on cooldown.
error_in_jail: You are in jail. Wait until you are released.
error_level_too_low: Your level is too low for this crime.
rankings_empty: No ranked players yet. Go commit some crimes!
rankings_no_username: Pick a gangster name on the dashboard to appear on the leaderboard.
error_load_leaderboard: Could not load rankings. Try refreshing the page.
jail_desc: See who's locked up. Train your breakout skills.
hospital_desc: Buy blood to restore your health. The streets are dangerous.
hospital_drop_note: Health drops every time you commit a crime. Higher risk jobs cost more.
hospital_amount_label: How much health do you want to buy? (max {max})
hospital_already_full: You are already at full health.
hospital_price_note: Price: $8 per health unit. Enter any amount or use quick buttons to fill exactly what you need.
casino_desc: High stakes. Real risk. Losses fuel the city economy and growing jackpots.
casino_pool_note: Grows with every loss. Big wins come from here.
casino_house_edge_note: House edge ~1.5-4% but big swings keep it exciting.
casino_blackjack_desc: Classic. ~48.5% win chance. 1.95x payout on wins. Donators get tiny edge.
casino_blackjack_note: All losses go directly into Blackjack pool. Big money moves here.
casino_roulette_desc: Red / Black / Straight up. House edge keeps pools growing.
casino_roulette_note: Every spin feeds the Roulette pool. The gamble crowd loves this one.
casino_roulette_lose: Spin {spin}. House takes the {bet}. Pool fed.
casino_footer: The Casino is the heart of the underground economy. Every loss you take (or others) grows the pools that pay the big lottery jackpots and future events. Play smart — or go broke trying. Donator status gives a microscopic edge.
safehouse_desc: Your properties for growing, storage, and cars. Details, costs, upgrades.
safehouse_none: Purchase a House, Villa or Mansion in Real Estate to unlock Safehouse features.
safehouse_welcome_mansion: Welcome back, Kingpin! Time to stack that empire in {name}. (Mansion vibes - let's hustle with style!)
safehouse_welcome_villa: Back in the game, boss. {name} is ready for the next move. Mid-tier motivation - keep pushing!
safehouse_welcome_house: Welcome back, hustler. {name} is your grind spot. Low life but we rise!
safehouse_details_note: Full details and upgrades coming. Pay bills in Real Estate.
safehouse_hired: Hired bodyguard #{num} for {cost}. Raid chance now {chance}%.
safehouse_bodyguard_note: Need 2+ to be effective. Max 10. Alternative: buy house weapon for protection.
safehouse_piggy_invalid_deposit: Invalid amount or not enough cash!
safehouse_piggy_confirm_deposit: Confirm deposit of {amount} to Piggybank? This will be hidden from global leaderboard.
safehouse_piggy_deposited: Deposited {amount} to Piggybank (hidden from global total). Transferred successfully.
safehouse_piggy_invalid_withdraw: Invalid amount or not enough in Piggybank!
safehouse_piggy_confirm_withdraw: Confirm withdraw of {amount} from Piggybank to Cash? (0.8% fee {fee} to Gov Tax, you get {net})
safehouse_piggy_withdrew: Withdrew {net} from Piggybank (fee {fee} to Gov Tax). Transferred successfully.
safehouse_piggy_note: Piggybank is hidden from general leaderboard. Family leaderboard sees full player wealth.
safehouse_shed_trackers_note: Live trackers: Progress, quality % (see Weed Grow for details). Cooldowns sync globally.
safehouse_shed_confirm: Confirm shed upgrade to lvl {level} for {cost}?
safehouse_earnings_result: Day earnings: +{net} (after 20% tax {tax}). Weekly earnings tracking updated.
safehouse_shed_section_desc: Weed storage and grow progress. Move to dedicated Weed Grow.
safehouse_garage_section_desc: Cars, tuning, racing. Full garage features.
safehouse_post_desc: Pay open bills, debts, unpaid taxes. Live trackers. Property tax rates and info.
safehouse_tax_rate_note: Property Tax Rate: 10% on purchase, 20% on earnings (to Gov Fund)
safehouse_confirm_pay_bills: Confirm pay all open property bills: {total} (cash)?
safehouse_bills_no_cash: Not enough cash for all bills!
safehouse_post_footer: All tax to Government Fund. Admin sees summary.
garage_desc: Cars tied to your property. Max cars: {max}. Upgrade Warehouse for more.
garage_locked: Buy a House, Villa or Mansion in Real Estate to unlock Garage!
garage_upgrade_note: Villa: base 4, +25/75/125 per lvl. Mansion: +10 more.
garage_upgraded: Warehouse upgraded to lvl {level}! Now holds {max} cars.
garage_need_villa: Need Villa or Mansion to upgrade Warehouse.
garage_tune_shop_desc: Basic tune +value. Buy parts below for speed bonuses (engine, turbo etc).
garage_repair_desc: Repair value. More damage = higher cost. Must 100% for tune.
garage_repaired: Car repaired for {cost}. Ready to tune!
garage_marketplace_desc: Low end (hatchbacks), Mid (sedans like Lexus/Mercedes/Nissan), High, Super sport.
garage_low_end_label: Low End (15 examples: Civic, Corolla, Focus, etc.)
garage_junkyard_desc: Crush for small bullets (city prices vary, low - better buy at Metal Factory).
race_desc: Post a race with timer. Opponent joins. Entry fee. 10min cooldown after. History below.
race_select_valid: Select a valid car (75%+ health) to post race.
race_health_req: Car must have at least 75% health.
race_posted: Race posted! Entry fee {fee}. Expires in {minutes} min.
stocks_desc: Prices driven by family power, crime volume, and live market ticks. Buy low. Sell high. Real money. Real risk.
stocks_portfolio_note: Holdings update on every trade. Advance the market by playing the game or refreshing here.
stocks_demo_warning: ⚠️ Demo data shown. Real stock market requires running the migration first.
stocks_migration_error: Stock market tables not created yet. Run the latest migration (FIX_034_stocks_table.sql or 034_stock_market_casino_economy_admin.sql).
stocks_admin_only: Only the admin can move the market.
stocks_footer_1: Market moves with the city: more crimes + stronger families = upward pressure. Losses from casino also subtly affect CASROY.
stocks_footer_2: Specific drivers active: Real Estate buys → GOTHAM up. Drug sales → PHARMA. Family power buys → FAMPOW. Heists → HEISTX. Racing → RACERZ. Casino play → CASROY.
stocks_admin_title: 🛠️ ADMIN MARKET MOVERS (only visible to you)
rebirth_desc: You've reached Godfather — the top of the food chain. Start over from the streets with a permanent +50% cash & XP bonus and 10% faster cooldowns (max 50%). Stacks with every Rebirth.
rebirth_confirm_text: Your rank resets to Slum Rat (level 1). Your cash stays. This cannot be undone.
rebirth_done: REBORN! The streets whisper your name. You now earn +{bonus}% cash and XP on everything.
error_not_godfather: Only a Godfather can be reborn.
crime_rob_store_desc: Quick cash, but the owner might fight back.
crime_steal_car_desc: Hotwire it and race to the chop shop.
crime_warehouse_heist_desc: Hit a warehouse for big scores.
crime_train_murder_desc: Practice your killing skills. High risk PvP training.
